mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notes (title, content, type, tags, summary, category, status, author, file_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{tags}, #{summary}, #{category}, #{status}, #{author}, #{fileUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE notes SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, tags = #{tags}, summary = #{summary}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notes SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, tags = #{tags}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
